maps.notes: Current staged WORR smoke map. This anchors strict Q2 reachability validation until the canonical Quake II reference map set is staged.

WORR-authored developer reference map with two normal-height rooms joined by a crouch-only passage. It validates generated TRAVEL_CROUCH, natural crouch route support, and spawn-to-high-value pickup reachability through that passage.
Optional id Quake II deathmatch reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates water entry/exit, elevator/vertical movement, weapon/item pickup coverage, and broader DM routing baselines.
Optional id Quake II deathmatch reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates multi-level DM routing, water traversal, ladder travel, elevator routes, and high-value pickup reachability.

Optional id Quake II deathmatch slime reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates slime brush contents, door diagnostics, item pickup coverage, and DM routing. High-value reachability is recorded but not a gate because one pickup remains spawn-disconnected in the static graph.

Optional open-layout deathmatch reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates broader open-map routing, long sightline/item-placement coverage, and door entity diagnostics. High-value reachability is recorded but not a gate for this structural reference because one pickup remains spawn-disconnected in the static graph.

Optional CTF reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates team spawn/flag objective diagnostics, flag origin reachability from spawn-connected AAS areas, water traversal, mover/door/teleport entity coverage, and item origin coverage. High-value pickup reachability is recorded but not a CTF structural gate.

Optional campaign/co-op reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates campaign trigger/door/progression diagnostics and water traversal. High-value pickup reachability is recorded but not a campaign progression gate.

Optional campaign liquid reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates water/liquid traversal, door-heavy campaign diagnostics, and item origin coverage. No slime/lava brushes were present in this local BSP.

Optional official Quake II campaign/co-op hazard reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates lava, slime, water, trigger_hurt/target_laser runtime hazard entity diagnostics, door/elevator/mover diagnostics, generated elevator routes, campaign progression coverage, item origin coverage, and high-value pickup reachability.

Optional mover-heavy campaign reference candidate. When staged locally, it validates campaign key/goal/trigger diagnostics, train/platform mover routes, door and teleport entity coverage, and water traversal. High-value pickup reachability is recorded but not a campaign progression gate.

reference_coverage.description: Current WORR packaged deathmatch map used by strict generator smoke tests.
Canonical id Quake II deathmatch maps for broader DM layout coverage.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2dm1/q2dm2 and optional q2dm7 when local Quake II data is available.

reference_coverage.description: Open-layout deathmatch reference coverage beyond the current WORR smoke map.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2dm8 when local Quake II data is available.

reference_coverage.description: Capture-the-flag reference coverage for team-objective map structure.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2ctf1 extracted from the local CTF pak when available.

reference_coverage.description: Team objective reference coverage for CTF flag and team spawn diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2ctf1 team spawn and flag objective diagnostics when available.

reference_coverage.description: Campaign/co-op map coverage for non-DM entity and traversal layouts.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged base1/base2/fact2/train campaign progression diagnostics when local Quake II data is available.

reference_coverage.description: Map coverage intended to exercise liquids, slime/lava, hurt volumes, swim, or water-jump routes.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged water/liquid and hazard maps; slime and lava also have separate feature-specific reference categories.

reference_coverage.description: Map coverage intended to exercise doors, plats, elevators, trains, buttons, or other moving geometry.
Reference readiness for water brush contents and swim or water-adjacent route diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2dm1/q2dm2/q2ctf1/base1/base2/fact2/train when local Quake II data is available.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for generated TRAVEL_CROUCH reachability and natural crouch traversal diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by the WORR-authored worr_crouch_ref developer map, which generates TRAVEL_CROUCH through a 36-unit-high passage.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for slime brush contents and hazard traversal diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by optional fact2 and q2dm7 when local Quake II data is available; skip-missing keeps installs without those BSPs informative.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for lava brush contents and hazard traversal diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by optional fact2 when local Quake II data is available; skip-missing keeps installs without that BSP informative.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for trigger_hurt, target_laser, or misc_lavaball runtime hazard entity diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by optional fact2 trigger_hurt/target_laser diagnostics when local Quake II data is available.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for teleport entity and generated teleport-travel diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2ctf1/train teleport entity diagnostics when local reference BSPs are available; generated teleport travel remains absent on the current local set.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for elevator/platform travel diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Currently backed by staged mm-rage and broader local reference maps with generated elevator travel counts.

reference_coverage.description: Reference readiness for door entity diagnostics.
reference_coverage.notes: Backed by staged q2dm7/q2dm8/q2ctf1/base1/base2/fact2/train door entity diagnostics when local reference BSPs are available.
